messages.content:
When there is high turnover rate, what could be a potential negative outcome for the workplace? 
(4 Puan)


greater motivation

lower employee commitment

higher performance

higher morale

more experienced workers
leaving, leading to a loss of institutional knowledge and skill gaps among remaining staff.

When there is high turnover rate, what could be a potential negative outcome for the workplace? which one is option
(4 Puan)


greater motivation

lower employee commitment

higher performance

higher morale

more experienced workers
One potential negative outcome for the workplace when there is a high turnover rate is lower employee commitment.

The question “What businesses will we be in?” results in..........?
(4 Puan)


freelancers

competitive strategy

human capital 

corporate strategy

intangible assets
The question "What businesses will we be in?" results in the determination of corporate strategy.

Strategic planning requires a strengths/weaknesses and opportunities/threats analysis.
(4 Puan)


True

False
True.

By using ....................., you present situations that represent a part of the job in question and evaluate examinee responses.
(4 Puan)


interviews

interest inventories

work samples

direct observation

intelligence tests
By using work samples, you present situations that represent a part of the job in question and evaluate examinee responses.

By using ....................., you present situations that represent a part of the job in question and evaluate examinee responses. which one is the result
(4 Puan)


interviews

interest inventories

work samples

direct observation

intelligence tests
Work samples.

As a manager, you make perfect plans, create a smart organization chart, buy the cutting-edge equipment for production, and subscribe to the best software but your company still fails...Why?
(4 Puan)


due to lack of technological infrastructure

due to inadequate training program

due to using outside sources of candidates

due to hiring the wrong people

due to poor compensation planning

One possible reason why the company fails despite making perfect plans, having an appropriate organizational chart, buying state-of-the-art equipment and subscribing to top-notch software could be hiring the wrong people.

As a manager, you make perfect plans, create a smart organization chart, buy the cutting-edge equipment for production, and subscribe to the best software but your company still fails...Why?
which one is the result


due to lack of technological infrastructure

due to inadequate training program

due to using outside sources of candidates

due to hiring the wrong people

due to poor compensation planning

"Due to hiring the wrong people" could be the possible reason why the company fails despite making perfect plans, having an appropriate organizational chart, buying state-of-the-art equipment and subscribing to top-notch software.

Direct observation is NOT a recommended method for collecting job analysis data for a ________ 's position ?
(4 Puan)


accounting clerk

nurse

gardener

historian

cook
Direct observation is NOT a recommended method for collecting job analysis data for a historian's position.

Direct observation is NOT a recommended method for collecting job analysis data for a ________ 's position ?
which one is the result


accounting clerk

nurse

gardener

historian

cook
"historian" is the position where direct observation is not a recommended method for collecting job analysis data.

A more diverse workforce refers to catering to the needs of the following except for? 
which one is the result


minorities

young adults

single parents

the disabled

women
"A more diverse workforce refers to catering to the needs of the following except for young adults".

After workforce planning comes.............?
which one is the result


selection and training

training and appraisal

recruitment and selection

recruitment and training

training
After workforce planning comes recruitment and selection.
